summary: No useful details on sound or performance; reviewer flags the date as incorrect.
review: The sole review merely points out that the tape appears to be mislabeled (April 1 1985) and does not discuss any musical or recording qualities. With no comments on audio fidelity or setlist, there is insufficient information to assess the show itself.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief, negative review that addresses labeling rather than performance or recording quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No comments on sound clarity, mix, or source; reviewer only notes a possible date error.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No information provided about the set or its flow.
